scripts.build: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge build; else echo 'forge not installed; skipping (install via foundryup)'; fi
scripts.check:abi: bash -c 'forge_bin=$(command -v forge || command -v "$HOME/.foundry/bin/forge" || true); if [ -n "$forge_bin" ]; then command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "jq not installed; cannot check ABI"; exit 1; }; "$forge_bin" build && diff <(jq ".abi" out/IClanWorld.sol/IClanWorld.json) <(jq "." abi/IClanWorld.json); else echo "forge not installed; skipping ABI drift check"; fi'
scripts.test: forge_bin=$(command -v forge || command -v "$HOME/.foundry/bin/forge" || true); if [ -n "$forge_bin" ]; then pnpm run check:abi && "$forge_bin" test;  else echo 'forge not installed; skipping'; fi
